title: Illager Additions+
description: This mod adds new illagers to your minecraft world, see description to view the mods compatibility list.
body:
"...A Darkness is brewing, something sinister shall ya falter in its prescense or fight!"

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Intoroduction!**
Hello! I'm Cap and the newest Member to the Illager team, with my soul intention of adding new content for you guys to enjoy! The creator has given me special permissions to port this mod to fabric so please enjoy this Mod and report any bugs to my discord! Make sure to visit the

**Absolutely nessecary Dependencies!** 
Install Forge Config API, and GeckoLib

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Intentions/FAQ!
Yes the mod will be down ported/up ported to Later Versions!

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Mods includeded

"The Cowboy" (Special Mob)
The Deadliest gunslinger in the west! Found only in the Badlands, for those of you unfortunate enough to find them, a quick, painful death is in store for you. (Does not spawn in Illager Raids)

"The Guards"
Skilled spearmen, they are found guarding their Outposts and Woodland Mansions with a fierce determination. When called upon, they will attack in Villager Raids! (Depending on difficulty, they can be pretty strong)

"Royal Guards"
These Powerful brutes deal damaging blows that'll send you flying into the air and diving to your deaths! Only found during Villager Raids, these Royal Guards are not to be taken lightly.

"The Beamloger"
A powerful magic user, these illagers have harnessed corrupted beacon magic, which they unleash upon their enemies! They are seen attacking with their kin during Villager Raids, but are not to be underestimated, for their abilities are both beautiful and deadly.

"The Samurai"
Samurai are proud warriors, always overlooking threats and Underestimating thier opponents, the shogun has a Great Many of them, loyal and cunning, only spawning in Villager Raids.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Compatibility
The mod is compatible with:
It Takes a Pillage Continuation
Guard Villagers
Illager Invasion
It should be compatible with any mods, if you find something report it to me.

**Credits
Created By a_pikachu and andrejulio
Ported/Optomized by CaptainGamer**
